name: tokenfactory-pi
description_en: Nebius Token Factory provider extension for pi coding agent. Requires `npm install -g --ignore-scripts @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent`. Install with `pi install npm:tokenfactory-pi`
description_zh: pi coding agent 的 Nebius Token Factory 提供程序扩展。需要 `npm install -g --ignore-scripts @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent`。使用 `pi install npm:tokenfactory-pi` 安装
